prompt: Extract the motion-vector direction from the blur and apply a directional smear to the text.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Apply a prominent directional smear effect to all text elements on the poster, including 'SKATE JAM', 'SATURDAY, AUGUST 21', and 'FREE EVENT!'. The specific motion-vector direction and visual style for this smear should be extracted from the prominent motion blur visible in reference image 2, guiding the application of the smear.
objects: "HARVARD SKATE PARK" text with smear effect
contact and registration details text (e.g., "REGISTER NOW!", website, phone number) with smear effect
